name: Toffee Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
Toffee Cream:
200 milliliters (7 fluid ounces) cream
85 grams (3 ounces) caster sugar
50 milliliters (2 fluid ounces) golden syrup
2 teaspoons butter
1 teaspoon vanilla sugar
Garnish:
250 milliliters (8 ounces) cream
Half to one tablespoon cocoa powder
To Drink: Coffee or sweet white wine
Level of Difficulty: Easy Preparation Time: 1 hour Prepare in Advance: Yes
Preheat the oven to 170°C/325°F/Gas Mark 3. Using a plate as a template, draw a circle on greaseproof paper. Grease the circle with butter and sprinkle over flour. Place the paper on a baking sheet.
Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gradually add sugar while beating constantly. Fold in almonds. Spread mixture on the greaseproof paper circle. Bake for 20-25 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Mix sugar, syrup, and cream in a heavy-based saucepan. Simmer over low heat, stirring constantly, until thickened. Remove from heat and beat in butter. Allow sauce to cool almost completely before adding vanilla sugar.
Spread sauce over the top of the cake. Beat cream until stiff and spread over toffee cream. Sprinkle cocoa powder on top.
Keep the cake cold until ready to serve.
